topic: Egyptian Arabic Content Master v1.2 skill pack

tasks.title: Freeze brief_schema + pack_router_map in factory pack
tasks.description: Copy or merge contracts/brief_schema.yaml and contracts/pack_router_map.yaml from this phase into factory/library/skills/egyptian_arabic_content_master/contracts/. Update design.md pointers in live pack if layout differs.

tasks.title: Align validation rubric with live quality_checklist
tasks.description: Merge phase validation/rubric_masri.md into factory pack as evaluation/rubric_masri.md (or keep phase as source until T-C06-01 completes). Ensure criteria map 1:1 to checklist items v1.1.0+.

tasks.title: Implement optional vertical stubs + golden_pairs placeholder
tasks.description: Add factory verticals/*.md from templates/vertical_stub.md pattern; add evaluation/golden_pairs.jsonl (append-only, anonymised) if pursuing quality-oracle spine.

tasks.title: Bump skill_manifest + registry manifest to 1.2.0
tasks.description: Update skill_manifest.json, factory/library/skills/manifests/egyptian_arabic_content_master/skill.md, and egyptian_arabic_content_master.md pointers for v1.2 capabilities.

tasks.title: Run spec density gate on this phase path
tasks.description: Run gate after scaffold complete; re-run after substantive edits. Write report to validation/density_gate_report.json.

tasks.title: Mirror skill pack factory to .ai/skills (rsync)
tasks.description: Final sync after factory edits and version bump. Source of truth remains factory/library path.
